pratighātaka, -ghātin a.
1 Hostile, inimical, opposed to.
2 Interrupting, obstructing;  U. 5. 29.  v. l.
3 Repelling, warding off.
4 Encroaching upon, disturbing.
5 Reacting.
6 Dazzling;  Ku. 5. 20.
